title: Field Service Engineer
description:
Nova Singapore is looking for a Field Service Engineer to support our business and drive its growth.

As a Field Service Engineer, you will play a pivotal role, contributing to the overall success of Nova. This position offers an exciting opportunity for individuals who are passionate about Semiconductor and are eager to make a meaningful impact through the role.

Roles & Responsibilities

1. Implement the Customer Support Policy for the OEM End User. Supervise, maintain and support company systems in the field.

2. Support OEM partners, and End Users internal service as defined under warranty and service support agreements.

3. Maintain, support, and guide proper training to all users, including OEM and End User personnel. (Training will be provided, in most cases, by an engineer dedicated to training).

4. Maintain proper reporting methods for all activities of customer support as defined by the Territory Service Manager/Customer Support Manager.

5. Maintain company’s parts inventory under the position’s control. Maintain proper level of stock in accordance with company spare parts tock policy, as set from time to time.

6. Assist in new equipment integration, “add-ons,” and upgrades.

7. Provide feedback to the headquarters based on experience gained with customers.

8. Support the customer beyond the defined working schedule as required.

9. Other tasks deemed necessary by the Management.

Requirements

1. Bachelor’s degree related to Semiconductor / Engineering industry.

2. Prior experience in semiconductor industry would be an advantage.

3. Good communication skills, team player, service orientate.

4. Able to accept work shift and oversea support if need.

5. Proficient in English.

6. Fresh graduates are welcome

Life at Nova:

  • Enjoy paid annual vacation and sick days, as well as allowance for transportation and spot bonus.
  • Get recognition of your special occasions and enjoy diverse holiday gifts and fun swag.
  • Employee Insurance (Outpatient Medical Plan, Hospitalization & Surgical Plan, Critical Illness Plan, Accidental Plan, Life Insurance Plan)
  • Take advantage of training and learning programs to further develop as a professional.


Get to know us better

Nova (NASDAQ: NVMI) is a global company and a leading provider of innovative metrology and process control solutions for semiconductor manufacturing.

With approximately 1,400 employees, three R&D centers and 31 sites worldwide, we provide valuable insights into the world’s most advanced industry. We leverage a variety of technological fields, including physics, optics, chemistry, and algorithms, to develop hardware and software solutions that measure nearly every advanced computer chip built in the world.

Nova dives deep into the atomic level, extracting unique insights using dimensional, materials and chemical metrology, providing our customers with crucial decision-making data, and addressing critical challenges by offering differentiated solutions.

Our outstanding, people-focused, and innovative culture means that every individual at Nova has the opportunity to make a significant impact and redefine the boundaries of what can be achieved through technology.

Sentronics Metrology GmbH (a Nova Company), acquired by Nova, is a leading metrology company specializing in high-precision measurement solutions for semiconductor manufacturing. Based in Mannheim, Sentronics brings over 25 years of expertise in developing cutting-edge metrology systems.

The company’s integration into Nova is already underway, and it is now an integral part of the Nova family, sharing the same values of innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction. The combination of Nova's global reach and Sentronics' advanced technology and specialized knowledge creates a unique platform for growth and innovation. As part of Nova, Sentronics will fully benefit from the exciting opportunities in the rapidly evolving semiconductor industry.


Join us if you are

A dreamer and brilliant high aimer who sees the impossible as the starting point and loves working in a multidisciplinary global team to create innovative breakthroughs.

• Nova (NASDAQ: NVMI) is a global company and a leading provider of innovative metrology solutions for process control in semiconductor manufacturing.
With a team of ~1200 people in three R&D centers and 27 field offices, we bring insights into the world’s most advanced industry. We leverage multiple technology fields such as physics, optics, chemistry, and algorithms to develop hardware and software solutions that measure almost every advanced computer chip built in the world.
• Nova dives deep into dimensions and layers at the atomic level to extract unique insights and provide our customers with crucial decision-making data, managing critical challenges by providing unique, differentiated solutions.
• Our outstanding people-focused and innovative culture means every person at Nova has the power to make an impact and significantly redefine what people can achieve through technology.


Our Vision:

We measure ourselves by our ability to transcend expectations and boundaries. We partner with our customers to craft innovative process control solutions enhanced with unique value
